description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a modern, open-plan layout, surrounded by a wooden fence and featuring a spacious green lawn on both sides. The structure is primarily white with large windows, a flat roof, and a driveway leading to a garage area. There are two prominent trees in the front and back yards, adding greenery and shade to the property. The backyard includes a small blue pool, visible from above, and a patio area adjacent to the house. The front of the bungalow features a covered porch with steps leading up to the main entrance. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on outdoor living and natural light.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a driveway, and a fenced yard featuring a pool and patio. The property is landscaped with trees and a spacious lawn.
description_view_0: Side view showing the main living area, patio, and a large expanse of green lawn bordered by a wooden fence.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the driveway, garage, main entrance with porch, and two trees flanking the property.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the backyard pool, patio, and additional green space with a tree near the fence.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the backyard, pool, patio area, and the back facade of the bungalow with large windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
